core.zh: 事件即将发生新变化，消息来临，移动迅速，自由与活力
core.en: New changes are coming, news arrives, swift movement, freedom and vitality

work.zh: 工作出现新变动，需要快速行动，可能转换部门，期待的答复即将来临
work.en: New changes at work, need for quick action, possible department transfer, expected reply coming

love.zh: 新的开始，会遇到心仪对象，新感情或友情的开始
love.en: New beginning, meeting someone you like, start of new romance or friendship

health.zh: 腿部、关节、急性病，注意膝盖与筋骨
health.en: Legs, joints, acute illness, watch knees and tendons

money.zh: 会有新的财经消息，可能收到支票或账单
money.en: New financial news, may receive check or bill

advice.zh: 提升效率，开始行动，继续前进
advice.en: Improve efficiency, take action, keep moving forward

time.zh: 快速，一天，一月，一个月的第一天
time.en: Fast, one day, January, first day of month

core.zh: 出乎意料的转机降临，好运与机会，但时间短暂
core.en: Unexpected turn of fortune, luck and opportunity, but brief

work.zh: 好机会降临，升等，顺心的成果，困难将成为过去
work.en: Good opportunity arrives, promotion, satisfying results, difficulties become past

love.zh: 突然的相遇，第二次机会，开心的感情，但不一定长久
love.en: Sudden encounter, second chance, happy romance, but may not last

health.zh: 一切将好转，即将康复，多吃蔬菜，接触自然
health.en: Everything improving, recovery coming, eat more vegetables, connect with nature

money.zh: 意外之财，有成果的投资，财经正在恢复
money.en: Unexpected windfall, fruitful investment, finances recovering

advice.zh: 保持正面态度，抓住机会，食疗散心
advice.en: Stay positive, seize opportunities, food therapy and relaxation

time.zh: 短暂，两天，二月，一个月的第二天
time.en: Brief, two days, February, second day of month

core.zh: 离开旧有模式，有所准备地进入新状态，旅行与距离
core.en: Leaving old patterns, prepared entry into new state, travel and distance

work.zh: 出差，去异地工作，离开原有单位，需要转移或更改现状
work.en: Business trip, working in another city, leaving current position, need to shift

love.zh: 外地恋情，长距离恋爱，旅行能获得恋情，转变可重燃火花
love.en: Long-distance romance, travel may bring love, change can reignite spark

health.zh: 循环系统，排泄系统，肝脏，膀胱
health.en: Circulatory system, excretory system, liver, bladder

money.zh: 清算，外出预算，贸易钱财，转账，可能有遗产
money.en: Settlement, travel budget, trade money, transfer, possible inheritance

advice.zh: 需要自由，旅行，尝试离开某种状态
advice.en: Need freedom, travel, try leaving a certain state

time.zh: 三天，三星期，三个月，三月
time.en: Three days, three weeks, three months, March

core.zh: 熟悉的模式继续稳定进行，家庭与安全感
core.en: Familiar patterns continue stably, family and security

work.zh: 安全安稳的环境，舒适的状态，在家工作，家庭企业
work.en: Safe and stable environment, comfortable state, work from home, family business

love.zh: 安定的关系，定下来成家，家人非常重要
love.en: Settled relationship, establishing a home, family very important

health.zh: 骨骼，关节，身体体态，平和的状态
health.en: Bones, joints, body posture, peaceful state

money.zh: 安全安稳的财经状况，不要冒险，投资房地产
money.en: Safe and stable finances, don't take risks, invest in real estate

advice.zh: 保持现有优势继续发展，保持本性
advice.en: Maintain current advantages, stay true to yourself

time.zh: 四天，四星期，四个月，四月
time.en: Four days, four weeks, four months, April

core.zh: 行为与思维惯性，长期存在的问题，需要耐心成长
core.en: Behavioral and mental inertia, long-standing issues, need patient growth

work.zh: 缓慢但持续增加进度，医疗灵性工作，建议同行业发展
work.en: Slow but steady progress, medical/spiritual work, stay in same industry

love.zh: 耐心是重点，灵魂伴侣，很深的爱心，缘分注定
love.en: Patience is key, soulmate, deep love, destined connection

health.zh: 心理健康，神经精神类问题，注意多休息
health.en: Mental health, neurological issues, need more rest

money.zh: 长线投资，稳定收益，多管道收入
money.en: Long-term investment, stable returns, multiple income streams

advice.zh: 按部就班，耕耘为先，放松冥想，接触自然
advice.en: Step by step, cultivate first, relax and meditate, connect with nature

time.zh: 五星期，五个月，五月，成长缓慢
time.en: Five weeks, five months, May, slow growth

core.zh: 混沌混乱的状态，看不清方向，疑惑与不安
core.en: Chaotic and confused state, unclear direction, doubt and unease

work.zh: 不愉快的工作环境，方向不明确，案子还没定下来
work.en: Unpleasant work environment, unclear direction, projects unsettled

love.zh: 灰蒙蒙的感情，事情有问题，脾气可能火爆
love.en: Gloomy relationship, problems exist, temper may flare

health.zh: 肺部，口鼻，躁郁，头晕，上瘾症，呼吸气管相关
health.en: Lungs, nose/mouth, bipolar, dizziness, addiction, respiratory

money.zh: 负债，莫名损失，财经有困难
money.en: Debt, unexplained losses, financial difficulties

advice.zh: 做清理，复盘经历，做个了断，深呼吸放松
advice.en: Do cleanup, review experiences, make a clean break, breathe deeply

time.zh: 六天，六星期，六个月，六月
time.en: Six days, six weeks, six months, June

core.zh: 事件错综复杂，进展难以顺利，背后有隐藏原因
core.en: Situation is complex, progress difficult, hidden reasons behind

work.zh: 挫折，背信弃义，有人在背后搞鬼，繁琐的状况
work.en: Setbacks, betrayal, someone scheming behind, complicated situation

love.zh: 嫉妒，背叛，不诚实，感情有谎言或第三者
love.en: Jealousy, betrayal, dishonesty, lies or third party in relationship

health.zh: 肠胃，消化系统，头发问题，小生病
health.en: Stomach, digestive system, hair issues, minor illness

money.zh: 小损失，坏的投资，债务，远离风险投资
money.en: Small losses, bad investments, debts, avoid risky investments

advice.zh: 保留实力，不露锋芒，小心信任的人
advice.en: Preserve strength, stay low-key, be careful who you trust

time.zh: 七天，七星期，七个月，七月
time.en: Seven days, seven weeks, seven months, July

core.zh: 某事终结，一个阶段的结束，痛苦但也意味新开始
core.en: Something ends, a phase concludes, painful but implies new beginning

work.zh: 结束就业，关店，失去工作，辞去无聊的工作
work.en: End of employment, closing shop, losing job, quitting boring work

love.zh: 爱情已死，心灰意冷，痛苦的结束，分手或离婚
love.en: Love is dead, heartbroken, painful ending, breakup or divorce

health.zh: 精神状态萎靡，慢性病，卧床不起，需要休息
health.en: Low spirits, chronic illness, bedridden, need rest

money.zh: 巨大损失，破产，财经崩溃，需要重新开始
money.en: Huge losses, bankruptcy, financial collapse, need to restart

advice.zh: 停顿休整，休息，待在家里
advice.en: Pause and rest, stay home

time.zh: 八天，八星期，八个月，八月
time.en: Eight days, eight weeks, eight months, August

core.zh: 某事进展顺利，状态和谐，欢乐与美丽降临
core.en: Things progress smoothly, harmonious state, joy and beauty arrive

work.zh: 得到推荐，有吸引力的提案，气氛好的工作环境
work.en: Getting recommended, attractive proposal, good work atmosphere

love.zh: 热恋期，收到礼物，互生好感，绽放中的感情
love.en: Honeymoon phase, receiving gifts, mutual attraction, blooming romance

health.zh: 康复回复，注意皮肤类疾病，花粉过敏
health.en: Recovery, watch for skin issues, pollen allergies

money.zh: 状况很好，财经优势将出现，收入稳定有额外收获
money.en: Good situation, financial advantages emerging, stable income with bonuses

advice.zh: 要开心，要美化，学习满足于现状
advice.en: Be happy, beautify things, learn to be content

time.zh: 春天，九天，九个月，九月
time.en: Spring, nine days, nine months, September

core.zh: 某事忽然被中断，突然的决定和行动，需要警惕
core.en: Something suddenly interrupted, sudden decisions and actions, stay alert

work.zh: 离职裁员，快速判断止损，终止工作，谈判破裂
work.en: Layoff, quick judgment to cut losses, work termination, negotiation breakdown

love.zh: 分手，痛苦分离，拒绝，危险的关系
love.en: Breakup, painful separation, rejection, dangerous relationship

health.zh: 意外伤害，动手术，骨折，切伤，牙痛
health.en: Accidental injury, surgery, fracture, cuts, toothache

money.zh: 资金链断，大笔支出，亏损，减薪
money.en: Capital chain break, large expenses, losses, pay cut

advice.zh: 快速做出利于自己的决定，不要犹豫
advice.en: Make decisions quickly in your favor, don't hesitate

time.zh: 瞬间，秋天，十天，十月
time.en: Instant, autumn, ten days, October

core.zh: 事件反复调整，争吵与冲突，也意味着高目标性与热情
core.en: Events repeatedly adjusting, arguments and conflicts, also means high ambition and passion

work.zh: 高强度高要求的工作，大量重复性事件，情绪紧绷
work.en: High intensity demanding work, lots of repetitive tasks, tense emotions

love.zh: 反复强调自我需求，争执，激情澎湃
love.en: Repeatedly emphasizing own needs, disputes, passionate

health.zh: 炎症，旧病复发，生殖类疾病，肌肉拉伤
health.en: Inflammation, relapse, reproductive issues, muscle strain

money.zh: 金钱纠纷，财务紧张，不饱和的财务安全感
money.en: Money disputes, financial tension, insufficient financial security

advice.zh: 反复确认方向和立场，先想再说，运动释放
advice.en: Repeatedly confirm direction and stance, think before speaking, exercise

time.zh: 一次又一次，十一天，十一月
time.en: Again and again, eleven days, November

core.zh: 某事尚未出结果，待商榷，沟通与交流是关键
core.en: Matter not yet concluded, pending discussion, communication is key

work.zh: 咨询行业，不断确认信息沟通交流，谈好的事仍有变化
work.en: Consulting industry, constant information confirmation, agreed matters may change

love.zh: 交流频繁，有共同话题，伴侣指示牌，需要继续了解
love.en: Frequent communication, shared topics, couple indicator, need more understanding

health.zh: 喉咙，喉咙发炎，扁桃腺
health.en: Throat, throat inflammation, tonsils

money.zh: 钱财来来去去，买卖，收入支出相差不离
money.en: Money comes and goes, trading, income and expenses roughly equal

advice.zh: 多沟通，了解全面信息再下决定，说出来
advice.en: Communicate more, understand full picture before deciding, speak up

time.zh: 现在，进行中，十二天，十二月
time.en: Now, in progress, twelve days, December

core.zh: 某事处在萌芽阶段，新状态发生，天真与纯粹
core.en: Something in its infancy, new state emerging, innocence and purity

work.zh: 新生意，新任务，与小孩有关的工作，可能缺乏经验
work.en: New business, new task, child-related work, may lack experience

love.zh: 新恋情，兴奋的时光，一步一步慢慢来
love.en: New romance, exciting times, take it step by step

health.zh: 易感类疾病，小感冒，怀孕，疫苗
health.en: Susceptible illnesses, minor cold, pregnancy, vaccination

money.zh: 小投资，零头，小财，新冒险
money.en: Small investment, small change, minor income, new venture

advice.zh: 释放赤子之心，用天真态度面对问题，简单轻松积极
advice.en: Release your inner child, face problems with innocence, simple and positive

time.zh: 十三天，十三个星期，一年
time.en: Thirteen days, thirteen weeks, one year

core.zh: 事情形式可能因环境而变化，需要警惕欺骗，也是工作指示牌
core.en: Situation may change with environment, beware deception, also work indicator

work.zh: 工作指示牌，大量日常重复工作，小心诈欺与背叛
work.en: Work indicator, lots of daily routine, beware fraud and betrayal

love.zh: 感情有欺瞒，引诱中带有秘密，不诚实
love.en: Deception in relationship, seduction with secrets, dishonesty

health.zh: 错误诊断，需要更多调查，存在误诊可能
health.en: Misdiagnosis, need more investigation, possible wrong diagnosis

money.zh: 不诚信的投资，需要小心被骗，远离风险
money.en: Dishonest investments, beware of scams, avoid risks

advice.zh: 需要防备警惕，不要信任表面，运用才智
advice.en: Stay alert and cautious, don't trust appearances, use your wits

time.zh: 下午，十四天，差了几个月
time.en: Afternoon, fourteen days, a few months off

core.zh: 某事影响力变大，存在不容小觑的第三方力量，权力与财富
core.en: Influence of something growing, significant third-party force, power and wealth

work.zh: 老板领导的指示牌，需要保护关照，高层主管
work.en: Boss/leader indicator, need protection and care, senior management

love.zh: 实在巩固的关系，稳固守护，但可能过于保护或占有欲强
love.en: Solid relationship, stable protection, but may be overprotective or possessive

health.zh: 营养饮食，体重控制，食物过敏，肌肉系统
health.en: Nutrition, weight control, food allergies, muscular system

money.zh: 繁荣舒适，庞大财富，优厚薪资，有收获的投资
money.en: Prosperity and comfort, great wealth, good salary, profitable investments

advice.zh: 坚定自己的立场，不要退缩，把控自己的生活
advice.en: Stand firm, don't retreat, take control of your life

time.zh: 十五天，六到八月
time.en: Fifteen days, June to August

core.zh: 有清晰的目标，但达到目标还需努力，积极的影响与新机会
core.en: Clear goals but still need effort, positive influence and new opportunities

work.zh: 信息技术，网络工程，按部就班朝目标前进，夜班
work.en: IT, network engineering, steady progress toward goals, night shift

love.zh: 幸福和平的关系，真诚的关系，坠入爱情
love.en: Happy peaceful relationship, sincere connection, falling in love

health.zh: 疗育希望，康复，皮肤问题，失眠
health.en: Healing hope, recovery, skin issues, insomnia

money.zh: 不用担心钱财问题，一切平稳顺畅，精密计划
money.en: No need to worry about money, everything smooth, precise planning

advice.zh: 确立目标，满怀希望，计划领导梦想
advice.en: Set goals, be hopeful, plan and lead your dreams

time.zh: 夜晚，永恒，十六天
time.en: Night, eternity, sixteen days

core.zh: 事物在之前基础上迎来新转折点，通常是积极面
core.en: Things reach a new turning point from previous foundation, usually positive

work.zh: 晋升提升，跳槽，找工作会有好的回响
work.en: Promotion, job change, good response when job hunting

love.zh: 感情迎来新阶段转折点，还想有更好的选择
love.en: Relationship reaches new turning point, wanting better options

health.zh: 会有所改进，腿部，双腿健康
health.en: Will improve, legs, leg health

money.zh: 薪水提升，往更好的状态转变
money.en: Salary increase, transitioning to better state

advice.zh: 等待时机，积极转变，往前往上看
advice.en: Wait for timing, actively transform, look forward and up

time.zh: 三月，十七天，春天，季节转换
time.en: March, seventeen days, spring, seasonal change

core.zh: 需要主动寻求帮助才能达到预想成绩，忠诚与友情
core.en: Need to actively seek help to achieve goals, loyalty and friendship

work.zh: 友善完美的工作环境，有人帮忙关注，寻求人脉帮助
work.en: Friendly perfect work environment, someone helping, seek network help

love.zh: 灵魂伴侣，建立在友情上的关系，信任与归属感
love.en: Soulmate, relationship built on friendship, trust and belonging

health.zh: 鼻子，味觉，口腔，请教医师
health.en: Nose, taste, oral, consult a doctor

money.zh: 维持平衡稳定，朋友会帮助，财政援助
money.en: Maintain balance and stability, friends will help, financial aid

advice.zh: 注意人际问题，展露值得信赖的一面，帮助他人
advice.en: Pay attention to relationships, show trustworthy side, help others

time.zh: 不会很快，十八天
time.en: Not soon, eighteen days

core.zh: 凸显事物的结构性、程序上的问题，权力与边界
core.en: Highlights structural and procedural issues, power and boundaries

work.zh: 高等职位，升等，政府职位，在医院或大公司
work.en: High position, promotion, government post, hospital or large company

love.zh: 稳定认真的感情，但可能被困住或令人窒息
love.en: Stable serious relationship, but may feel trapped or suffocating

health.zh: 脊椎与背，免疫系统，医疗中心
health.en: Spine and back, immune system, medical center

money.zh: 在银行安全，可以投资，长期投资收益
money.en: Safe in bank, can invest, long-term investment returns

advice.zh: 提高专业技能，设立界限，注意结构性问题
advice.en: Improve professional skills, set boundaries, watch structural issues

time.zh: 十九天，十九个星期
time.en: Nineteen days, nineteen weeks

core.zh: 某事具备传播性质，会扩大影响面，志趣相投
core.en: Something has spreading nature, will expand influence, like-minded

work.zh: 公关社交关系，广告节目设计，职业进展顺利
work.en: PR social relations, advertising, career progressing smoothly

love.zh: 在聚会中认识新欢，新的相遇，可能定不下心
love.en: Meeting someone new at gatherings, new encounters, may be indecisive

health.zh: 免疫系统，传染病，需要新鲜空气
health.en: Immune system, infectious diseases, need fresh air

money.zh: 繁荣，可以寻觅好的财务项目机会
money.en: Prosperity, can find good financial project opportunities

advice.zh: 四处看看，参加聚会，多社交
advice.en: Look around, attend gatherings, socialize more

time.zh: 下午，下个月，二十天
time.en: Afternoon, next month, twenty days

core.zh: 某事一成不变，难以改变，长期处在一种状态中
core.en: Something unchanging, hard to change, stuck in one state long-term

work.zh: 没有前途的职位，面对挫折障碍，冻结招聘
work.en: Dead-end position, facing setbacks and obstacles, hiring freeze

love.zh: 停顿的感情，僵持状态，冷淡与僵化
love.en: Stalled relationship, deadlock, coldness and rigidity

health.zh: 脊椎，骨头，盆骨，便秘，阻塞
health.en: Spine, bones, pelvis, constipation, blockage

money.zh: 收入遇到瓶颈期，负债重重，金钱挣扎
money.en: Income hits bottleneck, heavy debts, financial struggle

advice.zh: 超越之前的自己，沉淀一段时间，坚持努力
advice.en: Surpass your past self, settle for a while, keep trying

time.zh: 延迟，二十一天，三个月，冬天
time.en: Delayed, twenty-one days, three months, winter

core.zh: 某事具备可替换性，面临选择与决定
core.en: Something has alternatives, facing choices and decisions

work.zh: 需要做决策，面临新机会或选择，有好几个公司可考虑
work.en: Need to make decisions, facing new opportunities, several companies to consider

love.zh: 感情走到临界点，需要思考意义，可能有多人
love.en: Relationship at critical point, need to think about meaning, may involve multiple people

health.zh: 脖子，神经，血脉，淋巴，循环系统
health.en: Neck, nerves, blood vessels, lymph, circulatory system

money.zh: 有额外收入，许多投资机会，财务决策
money.en: Extra income, many investment opportunities, financial decisions

advice.zh: 寻求备选方案，做好两手准备，做决定开始行动
advice.en: Seek alternatives, prepare backup plans, decide and take action

time.zh: 与二有关，两星期，两个月，春天
time.en: Related to two, two weeks, two months, spring

core.zh: 因细节问题造成小损失，焦虑的关系，消耗与压力
core.en: Small losses from detail issues, anxious relationships, drain and stress

work.zh: 琐碎细节挤压，消磨耐心，充满压力的工作环境
work.en: Trivial details piling up, wearing patience, stressful work environment

love.zh: 不稳定的感情，痴迷，耗费精神，秘密交往
love.en: Unstable relationship, obsession, draining, secret dating

health.zh: 耳朵，口腔溃疡，皮肤溃烂，神经系统，传染病
health.en: Ears, mouth ulcers, skin sores, nervous system, infectious disease

money.zh: 判断错误致使损失，被偷窃，金钱损失
money.en: Losses from wrong judgment, theft, money loss

advice.zh: 注意细节，低调处事，不要张扬，坚持不要杞人忧天
advice.en: Watch details, stay low-key, don't show off, persist without worrying

time.zh: 现在，很短，几小时，几天
time.en: Now, very short, hours, days

core.zh: 某事令人满意，心仪的对象或有爱的过程，心情与感受
core.en: Something satisfying, someone you like or loving process, feelings and emotions

work.zh: 令人满意的工作，工作结果如愿，找到热爱的工作
work.en: Satisfying work, results as wished, finding work you love

love.zh: 充满热情的爱，新恋情，真爱，幸福与希望
love.en: Passionate love, new romance, true love, happiness and hope

health.zh: 心脏，心血管相关
health.en: Heart, cardiovascular related

money.zh: 舒适的财经状况，满意的收入
money.en: Comfortable finances, satisfying income

advice.zh: 以平和状态面对事物，凭心选择和前进，去爱
advice.en: Face things peacefully, choose and move forward by heart, love

time.zh: 二十四天，春天，夏天
time.en: Twenty-four days, spring, summer

core.zh: 体现某事价值共性，承诺关系的状态，确定与联系
core.en: Reflects shared value, state of commitment, certainty and connection

work.zh: 合约契约，公司融合，祥和的工作环境，重复替换的工作
work.en: Contracts, company merger, harmonious work environment, repetitive work

love.zh: 幸福，遇见新对象，坚定的感情，订婚
love.en: Happiness, meeting new partner, firm relationship, engagement

health.zh: 定期检查，复健，循环系统，淋巴腺
health.en: Regular checkups, rehabilitation, circulatory system, lymph glands

money.zh: 稳定的阶段，财经合约，合并资产
money.en: Stable phase, financial contracts, merging assets

advice.zh: 尊重承诺关系，投入答应，养成习惯并坚持
advice.en: Respect commitments, commit and agree, form habits and persist

time.zh: 二十五天，重复的循环
time.en: Twenty-five days, repeating cycle

core.zh: 表面阶段，实则内有乾坤，存在隐藏问题
core.en: Surface level, but deeper issues exist, hidden problems

work.zh: 文书教育类工作，遇到潜在问题，需要进修深造
work.en: Clerical/educational work, encountering hidden issues, need further study

love.zh: 秘密恋情，暗恋，关系中存在不可知信息
love.en: Secret romance, unrequited love, unknown information in relationship

health.zh: 记忆力，认知问题，大脑，隐性疾病
health.en: Memory, cognitive issues, brain, hidden illness

money.zh: 钱财条文有疏漏，潜在风险，奖学金
money.en: Financial terms have gaps, potential risks, scholarships

advice.zh: 进修学习，研究，安静不要说出来
advice.en: Further study, research, stay quiet and don't reveal

time.zh: 慢慢的，二十六天，不确定
time.en: Slowly, twenty-six days, uncertain

core.zh: 表现事件客观信息的状态，消息与文件
core.en: Shows objective information state of events, messages and documents

work.zh: 处理大量文书信息，合约文本，Offer本身
work.en: Processing lots of paperwork, contract texts, the offer itself

love.zh: 短信回复，情书，网络恋情，感情中交流的状态
love.en: Text replies, love letters, online romance, communication state in relationship

health.zh: 手和手指，药方，检测结果
health.en: Hands and fingers, prescriptions, test results

money.zh: 支票或请款单，银行账表，账单
money.en: Checks or invoices, bank statements, bills

advice.zh: 不要错漏任何可掌握的信息，写作，列下要做的事
advice.en: Don't miss any available information, write, list things to do

time.zh: 短暂，会很快，二十七天
time.en: Brief, will be quick, twenty-seven days

core.zh: 问题相关的男性人物或问主，代表男性能源
core.en: Male figure related to the question or querent, represents masculine energy

work.zh: 在工作环境有重要地位的男性
work.en: Male with important position in work environment

love.zh: 爱人，男朋友，先生，对男人有兴趣
love.en: Lover, boyfriend, husband, interested in a man

health.zh: 男性器官，男性荷尔蒙
health.en: Male organs, male hormones

money.zh: 财经与男人有关
money.en: Finances related to a man

advice.zh: 多用逻辑分析事物
advice.en: Use more logic to analyze things

time.zh: 七月，二十八天
time.en: July, twenty-eight days

core.zh: 问题相关的女性人物或问主，代表女性能源
core.en: Female figure related to the question or querent, represents feminine energy

work.zh: 在工作环境有影响力的女性
work.en: Female with influence in work environment

love.zh: 爱人，女朋友，妻子，未婚妻
love.en: Lover, girlfriend, wife, fiancée

health.zh: 女性荷尔蒙，右脑相关
health.en: Female hormones, right brain related

money.zh: 有关女性的财经
money.en: Finances related to a woman

advice.zh: 用感性与直觉
advice.en: Use emotion and intuition

time.zh: 五月，二十九天
time.en: May, twenty-nine days

core.zh: 事件进入酝酿期，需要等待发酵时机，静待时机
core.en: Event entering brewing period, need to wait for right timing

work.zh: 长期平稳可靠的工作，按部就班，需要耐心
work.en: Long-term stable reliable work, step by step, need patience

love.zh: 年长的爱人，旧爱，长情但平淡，日久生情
love.en: Older lover, old flame, long-lasting but plain, love grows over time

health.zh: 衰老症，反应迟钝，肾脏
health.en: Aging conditions, slow reactions, kidneys

money.zh: 长期没有突破，稳定收益但不见涨
money.en: No breakthrough long-term, stable returns but no growth

advice.zh: 需要耐心，运用智慧，不争一时之能
advice.en: Need patience, use wisdom, don't compete for short-term gains

time.zh: 冬天，长时间，三十天
time.en: Winter, long time, thirty days

core.zh: 扩大某事的积极影响，成功与个人能力得到认可
core.en: Amplifies positive influence, success and personal ability recognized

work.zh: 工作成绩瞩目，担任重要角色，前途光明
work.en: Outstanding work results, important role, bright future

love.zh: 轰轰烈烈的热情恋爱，极其吸引你的重要人物
love.en: Passionate intense romance, extremely attractive important person

health.zh: 眼睛，精神面貌，生命力，充满活力
health.en: Eyes, mental outlook, vitality, full of energy

money.zh: 收入令人艳羡，财运好，成功赚取钱财
money.en: Enviable income, good fortune, successfully earning money

advice.zh: 积极展现自己的能力，做自己，要有自信
advice.en: Actively show your abilities, be yourself, be confident

time.zh: 夏天，早晨至下午，三十一天
time.en: Summer, morning to afternoon, thirty-one days

core.zh: 突出某事结果后的评价与声名，隐性机会与个人满足
core.en: Highlights reputation after results, hidden opportunities and personal fulfillment

work.zh: 创造性文艺的工作，成绩带来新机会，发挥个人才能
work.en: Creative artistic work, achievements bring new opportunities, use personal talents

love.zh: 得到滋养的感情，善于考虑对方情绪，自我认可感
love.en: Nourishing relationship, considerate of partner's emotions, self-recognition

health.zh: 女性类疾病，下腹问题，激素内分泌
health.en: Female conditions, lower abdomen issues, hormones and endocrine

money.zh: 财运偏好，但有些许起伏
money.en: Good fortune trend, but slight fluctuations

advice.zh: 考虑他人情绪，寻求让彼此舒适的方案
advice.en: Consider others' emotions, seek solutions comfortable for both

time.zh: 下午到深夜，一个月内
time.en: Afternoon to late night, within a month

core.zh: 突出问题中某个关键信息，进入最关键步骤，成功与解决方案
core.en: Highlights key information in problem, entering crucial step, success and solutions

work.zh: 即将出现关键信息，具备解决能力，重要的工作职位
work.en: Key information about to appear, capable of solving, important work position

love.zh: 能开启心门的良好关系，关键的人，可能是正缘
love.en: Good relationship that opens heart, key person, may be destined partner

health.zh: 健康问题都可顺利解决，视力与集中注意力
health.en: Health issues can be resolved smoothly, vision and concentration

money.zh: 重复的投资成功，财经优渥，点子能增加钱财
money.en: Repeated investment success, prosperous finances, ideas can increase wealth

advice.zh: 注意最突出的信息点，开始行动，争取机会
advice.en: Focus on most prominent information, take action, seize opportunities

time.zh: 再一个月，就是现在，三十三天
time.en: Another month, right now, thirty-three days

core.zh: 发展方向暂不确定，存在多面可能，流动与自由
core.en: Direction uncertain, multiple possibilities exist, flow and freedom

work.zh: 多个机会选择，资源型岗位，自由业创业
work.en: Multiple opportunity choices, resource-based position, freelance/startup

love.zh: 隐藏需求未被满足，不想被束缚的想法
love.en: Hidden needs unmet, thoughts of not wanting to be bound

health.zh: 膀胱，肾，腹泻，多喝水，游泳
health.en: Bladder, kidneys, diarrhea, drink more water, swimming

money.zh: 财运指示牌，财务正常流动，利润收入增加
money.en: Financial indicator, normal cash flow, profits and income increasing

advice.zh: 给自己选择空间，深入了解需求，相信直觉
advice.en: Give yourself space to choose, understand needs deeply, trust intuition

time.zh: 日出或日落，满月，很多时间
time.en: Sunrise or sunset, full moon, lots of time

core.zh: 某事按既定方向持续稳定发展，有安全保障
core.en: Something developing steadily in set direction, with security guarantee

work.zh: 成功的事业，稳定的工作环境，达成目标，永久职位
work.en: Successful career, stable work environment, achieving goals, permanent position

love.zh: 安稳的感情，认真可依靠，信任，长期坚定
love.en: Stable relationship, serious and reliable, trust, long-term commitment

health.zh: 骨盆，状况稳定
health.en: Pelvis, condition stable

money.zh: 安稳不变的收入，安全的财经状况，长期投资
money.en: Stable unchanging income, safe finances, long-term investment

advice.zh: 确定定位，坚持前进，相信自己可以
advice.en: Confirm positioning, keep moving forward, believe in yourself

time.zh: 未来几个月，很缓慢，长期，可能一年以上
time.en: Next few months, very slow, long-term, possibly over a year

core.zh: 强烈的负面威压，心理上的责难，长期如此，但更强调心魔
core.en: Strong negative pressure, psychological blame, long-lasting, emphasizes inner demons

work.zh: 工作现况致使巨大障碍感，有逃避心理，受到责难
work.en: Current work causing huge sense of obstacle, avoidance mentality, being blamed

love.zh: 负能量缠身的关系，虐恋且三观不合，人格受打压
love.en: Negative energy relationship, toxic and incompatible values, personality suppressed

health.zh: 长期骨架酸痛，风湿，慢性疾病，疼痛
health.en: Long-term bone pain, rheumatism, chronic diseases, pain

money.zh: 负债，财务匮乏感重，贫穷，错误投资
money.en: Debt, heavy financial scarcity, poverty, wrong investments

advice.zh: 寻求心理和现实世界的平衡，心理重建，祈祷
advice.en: Seek balance between mind and reality, psychological rebuilding, pray

time.zh: 比预期还快（负面），需要耐心（承受）
time.en: Faster than expected (negative), need patience (enduring)
